upsells: Add landscape lighting along the patio edge.
Include annual re-sanding and sealing maintenance.
defaultAssumptions: Pricing assumes standard site access and no major grading corrections.
Estimate assumes compacted base prep is typical for residential hardscape work.
Permit fees, utility conflicts, and drainage redesign are excluded unless noted.

demolition_prep.label: Existing surface demolition and haul-off
demolition_prep.assumption: Existing material removal is limited to a typical residential patio footprint.

polymeric_sand_upgrade.label: Polymeric sand upgrade
polymeric_sand_upgrade.assumption: Joint stabilization upgrade covers the full patio area.

border_accent.label: Premium border accent
border_accent.assumption: Accent border is installed around the full patio perimeter equivalent.

upsells: Bundle an irrigation check and sprinkler tune-up.
Offer seasonal flower bed refresh for curb appeal.
Add a quarterly fertilization and weed-control plan.
defaultAssumptions: Estimate assumes lawn renovation is limited to accessible residential turf areas.
Topsoil import is limited to minor leveling rather than full grade reconstruction.
Tree removal, drainage corrections, and hardscape work are not included.

irrigation_tuneup.label: Irrigation tune-up
irrigation_tuneup.assumption: Existing irrigation system is present and serviceable.

mulch_beds.label: Mulch bed refresh
mulch_beds.assumption: Includes refresh of a typical front-yard bed package.

seasonal_color.label: Seasonal color installation
seasonal_color.assumption: Color rotation assumes standard annual plant density.

upsells: Offer a protective sealer for concrete or pavers.
Bundle gutter brightening or house soft wash service.
Add recurring maintenance visits for high-traffic surfaces.
defaultAssumptions: Estimate assumes water access is available on site.
Pricing assumes normal surface soiling without hazardous cleanup.
Oil saturation, paint removal, and post-clean sanding are excluded unless selected.

mildew_treatment.label: Mildew and algae treatment
mildew_treatment.assumption: Treatment is applied across the full cleaned surface area.

sealant.label: Surface sealant application
sealant.assumption: Sealant coverage is based on the total cleaned surface area.
